user.title: User Profile
user.description: Represents a user in the Discount Electrical Service portal with their custom claims permissions.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth UID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

updatedAt.description: When the profile was last updated.

claims.description: The Custom Claims assigned to the user for modular access.

employeeProfile.description: Optional extended HR onboarding profile data fields.

tracking_event.title: Tracking Event
tracking_event.description: Represents a telemetry data log from any of the subdomains.

timestamp.description: The server timestamp when the event occurred.

subdomain.description: The subdomain application releasing this event.

userId.description: UID of the user associated with this event.

userEmail.description: Email of the user associated with this event.

message.description: A descriptive message detailing the telemetry event.

details.description: Additional JSON metadata or details as string.

payment_config.title: Payment Config
payment_config.description: System config representing the selected payment provider.

updatedAt.description: When the payment gateway select state was saved.

updatedBy.description: User email or UID who toggled the provider.

stripeSecretKey.description: Encrypted or masked API private secret key for Stripe.

squareAccessToken.description: API private access token for Square.

invite.title: Onboarding Invitation
invite.description: Represents an active, secure onboarding ticket designed to pre-seed technician claim records.

service_request.title: Service Request Lead
service_request.description: Represents public electrical service request lead and booking drafts.

users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles and their assigned claims/modules permissions.

tracking_events/{eventId}.description: Secure collection storing telemetry tracking events from all subdomains in the Discount Electrical ecosystem.

settings/payment_config.description: Stores the central payment gateway toggle setting.

invites/{inviteId}.description: Stores secure pending and claimed technician onboarding invitation profiles.

service_requests/{requestId}.description: Stores service booking requests showing complete or draft/abandoned status leads.
